calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Petitioners: Deanna Hoffinger and John Stricklin were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors: Liam McAdams Stricklin and Jacqueline Gray Stricklin.

Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the two minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Liam George McAdams Stricklin and Jacqueline Louise Gray Stricklin.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
